legacy.content:
# Phase 36-01 Plan: Local policy-agent regression loop
## Objective
Guarantee that local action-policy agents can run and produce stable reports without MCP.
## Tasks
1. Add policy selection to browser playthrough runner and report UI. 2. Add deterministic fixtures per selected policy. 3. Add report diff checks (coverage, entropy, event/effect nearest profiles). 4. Add docs for running local policy-agent loops.
## Verification
- Browser-generated report includes selected policy metadata. - Deterministic snapshots are stable for canonical seed/policy pairs.
